text: @itskipronoh You might have a point brother Since Kikuyu put Ruto in power unlike Moi , don't you think they could get him out Anyway thinking is not easy Aug 10 2027 is coming
Isn't it weird how these communists are always scammers? Probably nothing.
@itskipronoh UDA in GEMA land will retain two mp seats. Kikuyu and Mbeere north juu hao hawananga akili.

@muamba_1 @Kimuzi_ That’s how’s you will be singing one term each election cycle. Kalonzo may come in or anyone else but you will sing one term once he cuts deals with your enemy. You will craft another candidate then the cycle continues. Fact! Kikuyus will always feel betrayed going forward.
@scherargei Even if not fake ni sawa pia, We want you to antagonize every tribe so that no one votes for kasongo 😂

@KIMANIICHUNGWAH Tumia! We saw you organizing goons to disrupt southern bypass in order to prevent opposition leaders from accessing Kikuyu but you failed. Case of reverse psychology but kasongo will begin treating all morima political igege in UDA with caution. Ata saprano will be replaced.
@FGaitho237 So He doesn't have a right to believe in Matiangi because he's a fellow Kisii..we tutigithie.

@OleItumbi Your boss started it when he killed innocent kikuyu kids in town parliament and called them terrorists by help of duale and murkomen Let ruto call 📞 yule number 2 He is just a call away and all will be well
@BillowKerrow The money is saccos are for kenyans Ruto's aim is to make everyone soo poor and himself filthy rich, the worst president in Kenya history #RutoMustGo
@Maryian96 Kalonzo mtu maendeleo alileta ukambani ni jela what a rot we will be in😌
@Honcalebamisi Wamaasai jata nao wamesema wanataka Yatch mbili waingie nazo hapo lake magadi. It will be chaos all over.

@RepublikFree He's copying the old political octogenerian tactics by finding a vehicle to further his selfish grandiose dissolution. He's aiming at replacing likes of outsated Luhyas likes of Mudavadi, Wetangula. So shameful

@NelsonHavi The divisive Wamunyoro anarchist and his goons in active politics can shout all they want, WsR doesn't need 100% of Murima votes, not even 60%, to get his second term. He'll get a good %ge there, add to majority votes from other regions, and win comfortably.
"WAMUNYORO is the chief anarchist and owner of violence in this country" Kimani Ichung'wah blasts Former DP Gachagua, opposes NG-CDF Board nominees

@rigathi punguza hii kiburi bro, hii ndio kiburi ilifanya utuletee Ruto central na hii ndio kiburi itafanya DCP ikue a non existent entity! Irungu Kangata is a saint and a small deity in kikuyu land. Court him and reprimand him in private, kingpin hafai hii mohahe yote uko nayo.
